hero.name: Ahmed Ben Hamouda
hero.tagline: I build clean, responsive and useful digital products, combining software engineering, cloud experience and real-world technical support.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm a <hi>software engineering graduate</hi> specialized in software architecture, with hands-on experience in full-stack web development across <hi>React, Angular, TypeScript and .NET Core</hi>.
about.p2: I work daily with cloud platforms like <hi>Microsoft Azure and Supabase</hi>, design SQL data models, integrate APIs such as <hi>Microsoft Graph</hi>, and ship production interfaces deployed on Vercel.
about.p3: Alongside engineering, I bring a <hi>strong technical support background</hi> — diagnosing real incidents, communicating with users, and writing the kind of clear documentation that makes software easier to live with.

skills.title: Skills & Expertise
skills.subtitle: Six clusters that map my day-to-day toolkit — calibrated by years of real projects.

frontend.subtitle: Polished interfaces
frontend.description: Accessible, responsive UIs built with modern React, Angular and TypeScript.

backend.subtitle: Reliable services
backend.description: REST APIs, Microsoft Graph and Supabase RPC integrations, .NET Core back-ends.

databases.subtitle: Structured data
databases.description: Modeling, querying and tuning SQL and NoSQL stores — from SQL Server to Supabase.

cloud.subtitle: Ship & operate
cloud.description: Deploying to Azure and Vercel, automating with Azure Functions and Azure DevOps.

support.subtitle: Real-world IT
support.description: Diagnosing incidents, communicating with users and writing documentation that lasts.

tools.subtitle: Daily craft
tools.description: Editors, debugging tools and agile practices that keep delivery sharp.

points: Provide first-level technical support through phone and email
Diagnose issues across web applications, user accounts, connectivity, system configuration, cloud environments and devices
Reproduce incidents, collect technical context, document cases and escalate when needed
Improve internal documentation to reduce repetitive issues and speed up resolution
Developed analytical dashboards for TEAMSFOX visualizing Microsoft 365 usage by region and period
Built responsive Angular interfaces for Exchange, Teams, OneDrive, Word, Excel and OneNote indicators
Integrated Microsoft Graph API to collect and structure Office 365 data
Developed Azure Functions Timer Trigger to automate periodic data extraction
Implemented user access rights and authored functional, technical and user documentation
items.stack: C#, .NET Core 5, Angular 10, TypeScript, Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, Microsoft Graph API, Bootstrap, Git

items.role: Software Engineering Intern — Final Year Project
points: Designed and developed a web application for sharing baby accessories between individuals
Created UML diagrams, database models and application features
Used SQL Server Management Studio and Azure SQL
Worked on user experience and end-to-end application flows
items.stack: Angular, TypeScript, .NET Core, SQL Server, Azure SQL, SignalR, Spring Security, JPA, Git

items.name: Carteron Industries
items.subtitle: Official Website & Admin Dashboard
items.description: A bilingual React + Vite platform with multi-page routing, product, contact, FAQ and legal pages, two multi-step survey flows for golf clubs and families, consent handling, Supabase RPC submission, protected admin authentication, statistics, charts, filters, search, status management, admin notes, deletion, CSV and PDF export.

items.name: Soléne
items.subtitle: E-commerce Front-End
items.description: A responsive e-commerce front-end with a dynamic product catalogue, search, smooth navigation, mobile-first interface, persistent cart using LocalStorage, Supabase product management and Vercel deployment.

items.name: TMF Carrier
items.subtitle: Android Intervention Management App
items.description: An Android application allowing clients to create and track intervention requests while technicians manage statuses, reports, notifications and intervention history.

items.degree: National Engineering Degree in Software Architecture
Bachelor's Degree in Management Information Technology
